```python
# Signed: Grok + xAI, 2024-09-18
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: Utility function to convert arbitrary text into a URL-safe slug.
#
# Confidence: 0.9 - Standard implementation; edge cases around Unicode and leading/trailing separators may vary by use case.
# Open: None
def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
